app.tagline: A practical guide to budget-safe daily meals
app.footer: Meal Planner · Making today's food decisions easier.

dashboard.ready_msg: Start with your goal, budget, and preferences, then get a trustworthy daily plan fast.
dashboard.generate_desc: Tell the system your goal, budget, and food preferences first, then get one realistic daily plan.
dashboard.profile_missing_detail: {count} items are still missing. Completing them helps the planner move faster.
dashboard.profile_ready: Your key profile details are ready. You can go straight into planning.
dashboard.history_cta: Review completed plans and quickly reuse a setup that already worked.

meal_plan.title: Planner
meal_plan.subtitle: Clarify the request, then get the plan.
meal_plan.chat_subtitle: Fill the key gaps first, then generate today's plan.
meal_plan.chat_panel_caption: Fill the remaining gaps and the result can stay grounded.
meal_plan.session_tip: The system reads your profile first, then asks only for missing details.
meal_plan.goal_summary: Once the goal, budget, and preferences are clear, the result can be generated.
meal_plan.chat_placeholder: Share your budget, food preferences, or answer the latest question
meal_plan.draft_hint: Press Enter to send. Use Shift + Enter for a new line.
meal_plan.prefill_hint: You can send the prefilled text as-is or edit it first.
meal_plan.final_hint: This session is complete. Start a new request to continue.
meal_plan.crew_subtitle: This is secondary information. Open it only if you want to inspect how the system moved forward.
meal_plan.process_hint: System details stay here so the main chat stays clean.
meal_plan.process_ready: Open the trace only when you need it.
meal_plan.process_empty_hint: There is no process detail yet.
meal_plan.crew_empty: There is no system trace to show yet.
meal_plan.trace_unavailable_locale: Detailed system trace messages are currently generated in Chinese only. Switch to Chinese if you need the raw trace.
meal_plan.budget_safe_hint: This result is constrained to your current budget.
meal_plan.session_failed: Could not create a session. Please try again.
meal_plan.message_failed: Could not send your message. Please try again.
meal_plan.generation_failed: Could not generate the final meal plan. Please try again.
meal_plan.auth_required: Your login session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
meal_plan.session_inline_error: The session did not start correctly. Retry here, and if it still fails, check your login state or the backend service.
meal_plan.message_inline_error: This message was not sent. You can edit it and send again, or retry in a moment.
meal_plan.generation_inline_error: The formal meal plan did not generate successfully. You can try again later or return to chat and adjust the constraints first.
meal_plan.reuse_prefill: I want to reuse the last setup: {details}.
meal_plan.missing_done: The key inputs are complete now. You can continue to the final plan or start a new request.
meal_plan.ready_to_generate: The key inputs are complete. You can start the formal meal generation now.
meal_plan.next_after_final: You can start a new request now or add this result to your shopping list.
meal_plan.answer_next: Answer "{field}" next so the planner can keep moving.

header_summary.active: Fill the key gaps and the chat can keep moving.
header_summary.ready: The inputs are ready. You can generate now.
header_summary.finalized: Today's final meal plan is ready.

meal_plan.result_subtitle: Review the result first. Return to chat only if you need more context.
meal_plan.result_explanation_summary: This result prioritizes your current budget, goal, and core nutrition constraints.

generation.title: Preparing today's meal plan
generation.summary: The system is checking your budget, nutrition targets, and food limits before revealing the final result.

steps.review: Reviewing your current goal, budget, and known limits
steps.balance: Balancing calories, protein, and ingredient feasibility

field_reasons.gender: Used to estimate a better baseline metabolism range.
field_reasons.age: Used to adjust calorie and nutrition targets.
field_reasons.height: Used to estimate body metrics and planning ranges.
field_reasons.weight: Used to calculate a more realistic calorie and protein range.
field_reasons.activity_level: Used to estimate how much energy you burn in a day.
field_reasons.health_goal: Determines whether this request should lean toward loss, gain, or maintenance.
field_reasons.budget: Determines whether the final plan is realistic and what ingredient density is possible.
field_reasons.preferred_tags: Helps the planner prioritize foods you are more likely to enjoy.
field_reasons.disliked_foods: Helps the planner avoid foods you clearly do not want.

shopping.title: Shopping list
shopping.subtitle: Track what you plan to buy or cook. You can add items manually or import meal names from a completed plan.
shopping.add_placeholder: Add an item, for example milk, chicken breast, or tomorrow's lunch ingredients
shopping.empty_title: Start with the items you need today
shopping.empty_desc: You can add items manually, or finish a meal plan first and import the meal names here as reminders.
shopping.import_success: Added the meals from this plan to your shopping list.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.subtitle: Filter by meal, budget, and calories to find dishes that fit your situation.
recipes.search_placeholder: Search recipes, for example chicken, soup, or porridge
recipes.error_desc: Try again once. If it still fails, check whether the backend is running.
recipes.no_recipes: No recipes match the current filters.
recipes.details_pending: This recipe does not have more detailed notes yet.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: These details directly affect calorie ranges, budget checks, and follow-up questions.
profile.onboarding_subtitle: Fill in these key details first so the chat can move more smoothly into the real plan.
profile.profile_ready: Your key details are ready. You can go straight into planning.
profile.profile_missing_detail: {count} details are still missing, and the system will keep asking for them in chat.
profile.chat_sync_title: Chat and profile stay in sync
profile.chat_sync_desc: If you provide age, height, weight, or activity level in chat, the latest values will appear here automatically.
profile.save_failed: Could not save the profile. Please try again.
profile.save_inline_error: The profile was not saved yet. Check the inputs and retry, or try again in a moment.
profile.goal_reason: Tell the planner whether this request should focus on loss, gain, or maintenance.

field_reasons.gender: Used to estimate a more realistic baseline range.
field_reasons.height: Used to estimate your body metrics.
field_reasons.weight: Used to calculate a more realistic nutrition target.
field_reasons.activityLevel: Used to estimate your daily energy burn.

history.title: Plan history
history.subtitle: Only completed meal plans appear here.
history.empty_desc: Once you complete the chat and generate a final plan, it will appear here for reuse.
history.reuse_ready: This setup is ready to reuse
history.error_title: Plan history is unavailable right now
history.error_desc: Try again once. If it still fails, check your login state or the backend service.

auth.login_intro: Sign in to continue today's plan, review saved results, and keep your profile current.
auth.start_journey: Start with the minimum details now. Body metrics can wait for the next step.
auth.minimum_signup_desc: Username, email, and password are enough for now. Age, height, weight, and activity level can be added in your profile or in chat later.
auth.login_missing: Enter both username and password first.
auth.invalid_credentials: The username or password is incorrect.
auth.login_inline_error: Login did not succeed. Check the username and password, then try again.
auth.register_missing: Enter a username, email, and password first.
auth.register_failed: Registration failed. The username or email may already exist.
auth.register_success: Account created. Complete the key details, then start planning.
auth.register_success_fallback: Account created. Please sign in to continue.
